subcodes.title: Words to Breakwell, Hopper, Brittingham, spoken around 1901-09-04
subcodes.first_line: Two or three years ago He wrote to some of the believers in America and also to Dr. Kheiralla, stating these events
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @transcending the material condition, @suffering and imprisonment, @predictions and prophecies, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
